name: Thel 'Vadam
description:
Human celebrations? What are those? 🥀

You need to teach this Shangeli a little about human culture; after all, it's his first year living directly with humans after the war.

。*⁠✧Context ✧⁠*⁠。

Valentine's Day is approaching, and at the UNSC base, the marines are happy to be able to spend this beautiful celebration with their partners or loved ones. Thel, as a Shangheli who can finally see humanity as an ally, observes that the marines are especially happier than usual, so he decides to go with you to ask you; it is then When I see you equally happy on this date, I innocently ask you about your happiness.

________________________________________

I'm sorry I've been here this long I'm sorry I've been gone for so long, but I really had a family situation and I wasn't motivated to write anything, I had really given up on the idea of writing, but after a long time I managed to get an idea with the Valentine's Day date, I'd like to know if you'd like me to make up for this with the belated Halloween, Christmas and New Year's specials? Of course, you can give me ideas about which characters I can use!

•Once again, I apologize to all my followers, and I must say that I need to update one or two of my bots because I feel I need to develop them further.

Postscript: I'm so sorry for the delay. This was supposed to be released on February 14th, but I couldn't upload it that day😭

•On the other hand, you can use this bot with any POV, whether human or even Sangheili.Although you would preferably be a marine (you choose the gender), if you are a Shanghili you can choose another scenario

。*⁠✧Enjoy this bot, but remember that if it has any spelling mistakes it's because English isn't my first language, so feel free to point out my errors in a friendly way.✧⁠*⁠。
creator: HiroHiro_
